CatalogPackageSource.description: One npm package source used during regeneration.

CatalogTreeSitterAttributeBuckets.description: Attribute name groups that share a parser value shape.

color.description: Attribute values represented by the color parser.

coordinate_pair_list.description: Attribute values represented by coordinate pairs.

css_text.description: Remaining structured CSS grammars that should be parsed as CSS text.

functional_iri.description: Attribute values that can contain a functional IRI / URL reference.

keyword.description: Attribute values represented as bare keyword tokens.

length.description: Attribute values represented by a single length/percentage parser.

length_list.description: Attribute values represented by a length/percentage list parser.

length_list_or_none.description: Attribute values represented by `none` or a length/percentage list.

number.description: Attribute values represented by a bare number parser.

number_list.description: Attribute values represented by a list of bare numbers.

number_optional_number.description:
Attribute values represented by one or two whitespace-separated numbers
(CSS `<number-optional-number>`, e.g. `stdDeviation`, `baseFrequency`).

number_or_percentage.description: Attribute values represented by number or percentage.

path_data.description: Attribute values represented by SVG path data.

view_box.description: Attribute values represented by an SVG viewBox.

CatalogTreeSitterSources.description: Source provenance for generated grammar facts.

css_unit_pages.description: CSS Values URLs used for unit extraction.

paths_html.description: Pinned SVGWG `paths.html` URL used for path-data grammar facts.

svg_clock_value_syntax.description: SVG Animations URL used for SVG clock units.

CatalogTreeSitterTokens.description: Token sets shared by multiple generated grammar rules.

angle_units.description: CSS angle units from CSS Values.

color_interpolation_spaces.description: Color interpolation spaces accepted by CSS `color-mix()`.

color_spaces.description: Predefined color spaces accepted by CSS `color()`.

length_units.description: CSS length units from CSS Values.

path_command_letters.description: Single-letter path command tokens from SVGWG `paths.html#PathDataBNF`.

time_units.description: SVG clock value metric units from SVG Animations.

title: svg-data tree-sitter catalog v1
description: Tree-sitter-facing projection of parser facts from the canonical catalog.

sources.description: Sources used to derive non-SVG grammar tokens.
